name: product-management-tools
description: Product management skills for turning messy inputs into aligned BRDs, PRDs, PBIs, priorities, and roadmaps.

interface.shortDescription: Synthesize, create, review, align, and sequence product work.
interface.longDescription: A local Codex plugin with focused skills for product intake synthesis, BRD and PRD creation, stakeholder alignment, mission, vision, values, product backlog items, prioritization, and product roadmaps.
defaultPrompt: Diagnose this product management request and recommend the right skill sequence.
Synthesize these meeting notes into structured product context.
Create a BRD for this initiative.
Create a PRD for this product idea.
Create an alignment plan for this PRD.
Review this roadmap for sequencing and feasibility.
Prioritize these PBIs and explain the tradeoffs.
